name: @speedora/thumbnail-selection
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Thumbnail Selection, Phase 4 of the thumbnail roadmap. Level 2 (frame/timestamp) selection only - never chooses which clip; that's @speedora/fusion-engine's highlightScore/highlightRank job. Decides which timestamp inside an already-chosen clip makes the best thumbnail, using only per-timestamp signals (face landmarks, facial emotion, OCR tracks, gestures, motion energy, primary-subject position) already computed elsewhere. Never detects/tracks anything itself, only scores and picks among already-computed candidates. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/worker's render-clip adapter via a render-graph node.
